subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! Through the intensity of thy steadfastness and firmness thou hast made amends for the wavering and shortcomings of thy brother. Although [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله شما از شدت ثبوت و رسوخ تلافی لغزش و فتور اخوی نمودید اگرچه آن
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
